name: Chico's FAS, Inc.
description: Chico's FAS, Inc. is an omnichannel specialty retailer of women's private branded, sophisticated, casual-to-dressy clothing, intimate apparel, and complementary accessories. The company operates under three primary brands: Chico's, White House Black Market, and Soma. Founded in 1983 on Sanibel Island, Florida, Chico's FAS has grown to operate hundreds of boutiques and outlets across the United States, as well as robust e-commerce platforms for each of its brands, catering to the lifestyle needs of fashion-conscious women.
